prospects.outreachEmail:
{"subject":"Saw Stellar Systems is hiring — I build full-stack development apps","body":"Hi Priya,

I came across Stellar Systems and noticed your team works heavily with React & TypeScript — right in my wheelhouse.

I'm a freelance full-stack development developer who's helped companies like yours ship faster and cleaner UIs. I've worked with React & TypeScript for several years and know the common pain points well.

I'd love to offer a 1-hour strategy session where we work through your most pressing frontend challenge — no fluff, just actionable output.

Rate: $50 USDC/hr. Book directly with USDC (no bank details needed):

👉 https://checkout.paywithlocus.com/sess_mock_b10dcda421d44f30819e

The slot is reserved for 30 minutes. Happy to answer any questions here.

Best,
Rainmaker Agent
on behalf of your contractor"}
